fields.definition_from_readme: Name of the pipeline (or pipeline system, when it has multiple pieces, phases, segments, or expansions)
Name of the pipeline segment (which can be a segment of a bigger pipeline system/network, or an expansion project)
Link to project's GEM.wiki page
A unique ID for each project (all the phases, segments, expansions, etc. belonging to the same overall pipeline do not necesssarily share a ProjectID, but they should share the same PipelineName)

Operating, Proposed, Retired, Construction, Shelved, Cancelled, Idle, or Mothballed

If there have been no development updates in the two years following the project's proposal, then the status is assumed to be "Shelved". If there have been no development updates in the 4 years following the project's proposal or longer, the status is assumed to be "Cancelled". If Shelved, Cancelled, or Retired, these are associated with ShelvedYear, CancelledYear, and StopYear
Date this was last checked/updated (filled in by Researcher)
Gas, Hydrogen, or Gas and Hydrogen (for projects that are billed as H2 pipelines but will first transport gas...)

First year operations initiated, or expected to initiate
Year operations initiated for first expansion project, or expected to initiate, if expansion not listed as separate observation
Year operations initiated for second expansion project, or expected to initiate, if expansion not listed as separate observation
If Status=Shelved, the year this became true
If Status=Cancelled, the year this became true

Year operations ended (if Status="Mothballed", Status="Idle", or Status="Retired") or the year the project was cancelled (if Status="Cancelled"). If Status="Cancelled" due to 4-year rule* (as opposed to a formal cancellation), then StopYear="presumed"
Maximum potential capacity
Units that "Capacity" is reported in (bpd, bcm/year, mtpa, MMcf/d, or TJ/d)

Publicly available length, converted to km
Estimated length in km, calulated using route coordinates with Geopandas Python package and taken from "Length Estimates by Pipeline" tab)
Merge between LengthKnownKm and LengthEstimateKm (LengthKnownKm is priotized when available; otherwise LengthEstimateKm is used).
Pipeline's diameter (without units); when multiple values are reported, they are separated by a comma
Pipeline's diameter units

low: basic point A to point B connection
medium: route is not a straight line, but hasn't been traced
high: route has been digitally traced in GIS software or the shapefile has been obtained from a reliable source
no route: we don't have a route for it, either because it's unavailabe/unknown or is a capacity/directionality expansion

top_values: Not mapped (but could be — route or endpoints are known)
fields.definition_from_readme: Type of route (whether it's mapped, unmapped but could be, etc.). If "Included in other ProjectID", this row's route is included in another project in the tracker, and the length of it is not included in overall totals.
